stories.title: Murati’s Thinking Machines releases first AI model for broad use
stories.simple_summary: A new AI company called Thinking Machines released their first AI tool that anyone can use.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to tech companies and developers — nothing you need to act on right now.

stories.title: SpaceX slips below its $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
stories.simple_summary: SpaceX's stock price has dropped since it first started trading publicly, and people are becoming less excited about the company's promises.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
stories.simple_summary: Thinking Machines released a new AI tool called Inkling that works differently than other AI systems.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to tech companies and developers — nothing you need to act on right now.

stories.title: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
stories.simple_summary: Someone hacked into the AI music company Suno and found that it copied millions of songs from YouTube, Deezer, and other music websites to teach itself how to make music.
stories.why_it_matters: If you're a musician or songwriter, this matters because your music may have been copied without permission to train AI.

stories.title: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
stories.simple_summary: A hacker broke into Suno's systems and discovered the company secretly copied decades of audio from YouTube to train its music-making AI.
stories.why_it_matters: If you're a musician or songwriter, this matters because your work may have been used to train this AI without asking you first.

stories.title: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
stories.simple_summary: Whatnot, a live shopping platform (like a TV shopping channel but online), bought a company called Shaped that helps suggest products to customers in real-time.
stories.why_it_matters: If you sell things on live shopping platforms, the recommendations to customers might get smarter, which could help you sell more.

stories.title: Bernie and AOC Are Taking On AI. Only One of Them Is Doing It Right.
stories.simple_summary: Politicians Bernie Sanders and AOC are speaking out about AI, but they have different approaches.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly political news — not something you need to act on.

stories.title: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
stories.simple_summary: Microsoft fixed 570 security problems (a record number) in its software, and it used AI to help find many of these problems.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Microsoft products, your computer is getting safer because Microsoft is using AI to find bugs faster.

stories.title: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI created a small device with buttons designed to work with its Codex coding platform.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to computer programmers — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba’s Qwen AI
stories.simple_summary: Apple got permission to use AI features in China by partnering with a Chinese company called Alibaba to provide the AI instead.
stories.why_it_matters: If you own an Apple device in China or do business there, Apple's AI features will now work in that country.

stories.title: Inside Ode with Anthropic, the startup betting AI services are the future of enterprise
stories.simple_summary: A new company called Ode is sending engineers to help big businesses use AI, backed by major investment firms.
stories.why_it_matters: If you run a very large company, this is a new service to consider, but most small businesses don't need this yet.

stories.title: We'd Rather Live Through the Trojan War Than Spend 135 Minutes Watching an Entirely AI Version of "The Odyssey"
stories.simple_summary: Someone made a version of the ancient story "The Odyssey" entirely using AI, and critics think it's not good.
stories.why_it_matters: This doesn't affect you — it's just commentary on whether AI-made entertainment is worth watching.
